LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedBatteries.description: Develop pre-War Poseidon battery units capable of storing large amounts of energy with minimal loss.
LanguageData.VFE_AdvancedPowerSources.description: Recover advanced Poseidon generation hardware, including solar arrays, hydro units, and high-capacity turbine systems.
LanguageData.VFE_IndustrialGenerators.description: Develop heavy-duty Poseidon generator systems built to store more fuel and feed more power into the grid.
LanguageData.VFE_NuclearPower.description: Restore the harshest end of the pre-War power ladder: compact reactor systems with enormous output and equally severe failure risks.
LanguageData.VFE_TidalPower.description: Build Poseidon tidal generators on open water to supply steady industrial power from current and surf.
